title: Multica Squad Configuration
description: Optional schema for a squad-level configuration file. Each squad folder may contain a squad.json alongside its agent subfolders.

description.description: Purpose and scope of the squad.

leader_agent.description: Slug of the agent that serves as this squad's leader. References an agent folder within this squad directory.

agent_slug.description: Slug of the agent folder within this squad directory.

members.description: Agents that belong to this squad, with their roles.
